text: Reviewed 15 files changed in the accessibility audit PR. Changes are well-aligned with the audit plan: focus-visible rings on interactive elements, touch target sizing (min-w/44px), theme token consistency (brand-* replacing raw colors), motion-safe prefix on animations, ARIA attributes, Escape key handling, and emoji→SVG icon migration. Found 4 actionable issues — 1 important miss (close button on new CelebrationOverlay component lacks focus ring), and 3 minor pre-existing inconsistencies not addressed by this PR.

message: Good use of `role="status"` with descriptive `aria-label` — screen readers will announce the streak count as a live region update.
Added Escape key handler to close notification panel — good keyboard dismissal pattern.
Backdrop click dismissal wrapped in useCallback with proper dependency array — avoids unnecessary re-renders.
Replaced emoji medals with Lucide SVG icons, adding proper aria-label and color classes — better accessibility and theming.
Social links updated from fixed h-8/w-8 to min-w-[44px]/min-h-[44px] — meets WCAG touch target requirements.

New close button is missing `focus-visible:ring-2` and `focus-visible:outline-none`. Every other interactive element in this PR received focus rings, but this newly added close button was missed. Keyboard users will see only the browser default outline instead of the branded focus ring.

Primary nav item links (`visibleItems` map) lack `focus-visible:ring` classes. The 'More' and close buttons were fixed, but the four main nav links remain without branded focus indicators. They rely on browser default outline only.

Uses `text-destructive` (shadcn/ui token) for the upload error message, while the rest of the codebase (and this PR's own changes to LevelProgressCard) consistently use `text-brand-error`. Pre-existing inconsistency not addressed.
Cancel and Add buttons in the endorsement form lack `focus-visible:ring`. The adjacent delete button was fixed with min-touch-target and focus ring, but these form action buttons were not updated.

PR is nearly ready. Address the CelebrationOverlay close button focus ring (important) before merge. The minor issues in BottomNav, ProofUploadForm, and PeerEndorsementInput are pre-existing and acceptable to defer, but should be tracked for follow-up.
